videos.headline: Carson Beck's 4 first-half TDs power Georgia to win
videos.description: Carson Beck shines in the first half, throwing four touchdowns in Georgia's blowout win over UMass.

videos.headline: UMass takes a 7-0 lead over Georgia with a CJ Hester TD
videos.description: UMass' CJ Hester scores the short touchdown to give the Minutemen a 7-0 lead over Georgia.

videos.headline: Oscar Delp lays out toward the pylon for a 17-yard TD
videos.description: Oscar Delp hauls in the short pass and speeds down the sideline for a 17-yard Georgia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oscar Delp lays out toward the pylon for a 17-yard TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET
